mapper.select: SELECT * FROM R_USER_T WHERE EMAIL = #{EMAIL} AND EMAIL IS NOT NULL AND EMAIL != ''
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO R_USER_T (EMAIL, NAME, PROFILE_IMAGE, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID) VALUES (NULLIF(#{EMAIL}, ''), #{NAME}, #{PROFILE_IMAGE}, #{SOCIAL_TYPE}, #{SOCIAL_ID})
INSERT INTO R_USER_T (LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, EMAIL, NAME, PHONE, SOCIAL_TYPE) VALUES (#{LOGIN_ID}, #{PASSWORD}, NULLIF(#{EMAIL}, ''), #{NAME}, #{PHONE}, 'LOCAL')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM R_USER_T WHERE PHONE = #{PHONE} AND PHONE IS NOT NULL AND PHONE != '' AND SOCIAL_TYPE = 'LOCAL'
mapper.update: UPDATE R_USER_T SET PASSWORD = #{PASSWORD}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, EMAIL, NAME, PHONE, PROFILE_IMAGE, SOCIAL_TYPE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, STATUS, ALL_GROUP_VIEW, REVIEWED_AT FROM R_USER_T ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE R_USER_T SET STATUS = #{STATUS}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
UPDATE R_USER_T SET ALL_GROUP_VIEW = #{ALL_GROUP_VIEW}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
UPDATE R_USER_T SET REVIEWED_AT = NOW(), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
UPDATE R_USER_T SET NAME = #{NAME}, EMAIL = NULLIF(#{EMAIL}, ''), PHONE = #{PHONE}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
